title: Dierbachia breviflora
intro: Dierbachia breviflora, also known as Breviflora, is a plant species belonging to the family Compositae, native to South Africa. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as fever, pain, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Dierbachia breviflora include flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tincture or infusion, with the most common preparations being a liquid extract or dried herbal powder.
